untranslatable_reason: Signal requires beta calculation and decile ranking across security universe, which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Beta is a cross-sectional risk metric requiring historical return correlation to market index. Also requires portfolio-level rebalancing logic not supported by single-security indicator set. This is a factor/portfolio construction strategy rather than a technical indicator-based signal.
translation_notes: Betting Against Beta (BAB) is a factor strategy that requires: (1) calculation of systematic beta for each security, (2) ranking securities into deciles by beta, (3) portfolio construction with leverage/de-leverage adjustments. None of these operations can be expressed using only price/volume technical indicators. The strategy operates at portfolio construction level, not individual security level with standard OHLCV indicators.
